user_story: As an HR admin, I want to enable the performance review module, so that employees and managers can participate in performance reviews
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Setup screen; When I select "Yes" for enabling the performance review module and click Save; Then the performance review module is enabled

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to disable the performance review module, so that reviews are turned off when not needed
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Setup screen; When I select "No" for enabling the performance review module and click Save; Then the performance review module is disabled

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to save my setup choice and proceed to the next step, so that I can continue configuring performance reviews
acceptance_criteria: Given I have answered the enable-module question; When I click Save & Next; Then my choice is saved and I am taken to the Performance Review Configuration step

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to cancel my setup changes, so that I can discard an unintended enable/disable choice
acceptance_criteria: Given I have made a selection on the Setup screen; When I click Cancel; Then my unsaved changes are discarded
